reviews.comment:
Siempre pare para las necesidades de mi mascota, pero esta vez entre a la cafeteria.  Excelente atención de todos los chicos, estaban las mesas completas pero guardando el protocolo, me parecio un poco caro, pero no pude evitar notar la limpieza y amabilidad de sus empleados y la rapidez en la atencion, vale la pena parar para almorzar o tomar un  rico cafe, por cierto las  porciones no son abundantes, pero si van y no saben que comer sin dudas el tostado de jamon y queso en pan arabe riquisimo!!!!

(Translated by Google)
I always stop by for my pet's needs, but this time I went into the cafeteria. Excellent service from all the staff; the tables were full but they were following the proper protocols. I thought it was a bit pricey, but I couldn't help but notice the cleanliness, the friendliness of the employees, and the speed of the service. It's worth stopping for lunch or a delicious coffee. By the way, the portions aren't huge, but if you go and don't know what to order, the ham and cheese toastie on pita bread is definitely a great choice!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhd0tMZUFnEAE
